objects.text: Dedicated and expurienced medical assistant with (X] years of comprehensive clinical and administrative experience seeking a mid-career position in a reputable healthcare facility. Adept at providing exceptional patient care, efficiently managing medical office operations, and collaborating effectively with healthcare teams, Seeking to leverage expertise and skills to contribute to the delivery of high-quality healthcare services.

Assisted in the examination and treatment of patients, taking vital signs, documenting medical histories, and updating clectronic health records (EHR) accurately and
• Prepared examination rooms, ensuring cleanliness and availability of necessary supplies and equipment.
• Administered injections, medications, and vaccinations following established protocols
